testsuite.name: test.snake.SnakeTestsAssignment1_1
testsuite.system-out:
Passed 24/24 tests ================================================ Total Functionality Points : 4.00/4.00 [100.00%] ================================================ (Initial code style points: 5.00) ============================================ testStartCorrectly : [√] Pass : +0.17 Points This is what we got & expected:
step=0, rand=0, actions=<> Want & Got ---------- OO>A.. ......
======================================= testApplePos3 : [√] Pass : +0.17 Points This is what we got & expected:
step=0, rand=3, actions=<> Want & Got ---------- OO>... A.....
======================================= testApplePos8 : [√] Pass : +0.17 Points This is what we got & expected:
step=0, rand=8, actions=<> Want & Got ---------- OO>... .....A
============================================ testNoRoomForApple : [√] Pass : +0.17 Points This is what we got & expected:
step=0, rand=2, actions=<> Want & Got ---------- OO>..A
step=1, rand=2, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- .OO>.A
step=2, rand=2, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- ..OO>A
step=3, rand=2, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- ..AOO>
step=4, rand=2, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- >.AOOO
step=5, rand=2, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- O>AOOO
step=6, rand=2, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- OO>OOO
step=7, rand=2, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- GameOverDisplay()

step=0, rand=3, actions=<> Want & Got ---------- OO>... A.....
step=1, rand=3, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- .OO>.. A.....
step=2, rand=3, actions=<Step> Want & Got ---------- ..OO>. A.....

step=2, rand=5, actions=<ChangeDir(West()), Step> Want & Got ---------- ..OO>. ..A...

step=0, rand=2, actions=<> Want & Got ---------- OO>. .A..
